sentences.translation: Otac je dao sinu novi telefon.
sentences.translationEn: The father gave his son a new phone.

sentences.translation: Dječak se obradovao i puno zahvalio ocu.
sentences.translationEn: The boy was happy and thanked his father a lot.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: اسْتَخْدِمْهُ بِحِكْمَةٍ وَلَا تُكْثِرْ مِنَ الشَّاشَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Koristi ga mudro i nemoj previše gledati u ekran.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: Use it wisely and don't spend too much time on the screen.

sentences.translation: Dječak se složio i obećao to.
sentences.translationEn: The boy agreed and promised to do so.
